---
title: "gitcheck_module7"
author: "BEVERLY GONZALEZ"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

setwd("~/Desktop/Spring2026_BHDS2010")


#read data and save this to an object called bookhappy
bookhappy <- read.csv("BookHappiness.csv", header=TRUE)

table(bookhappy$happy)

```
